HSR (honkai star rail)・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

hello my little berries! i hope ur all doing fine bc i got another request!! yipee! this request was made by unknownzzz and i really loved this prompt! it reminds me of the story of perseus in the greek myths you'll see why! still recommending u to give out some requests for me if you haven't already, this is the link <3

also WAS IT NOT KUST YESTERDAY I WAS THANKING U GUYS FOR 61 FOLLOWERS??? NOW I HAVE 72 LIKE HUH?? It's like I'm getting 10 followers each day like THE FLIP?? maybe its just regular account growth and im not used to it but still i really appreciate all of the support like a WHOOOLE lot and by the looks of it i might have 100 followers on Sunday?? idk what you guys like abt me bc im just this loser girl that makes bots and decides to public them but whatever im doing i hope you'll continue to enjoy it!!! 😋

ive started to take a liking to mydei, so i might make more bots of him later on since there's so much to his backstory and i LOVE back stories that i find interesting so dont be surprised if you see 3 mydei bots in a row if you go on my profile one time! anyways that's all for today luv u all and have a good rest of the day! 😚😚
